face.structure: Softly angular with a pronounced chin and high cheekbones.

eyes.shape: Narrow, sharp almond shape with inward-tilted corners.
eyes.color: Dark brown with hints of gold flecks.
details: Long, thick eyelashes that cast subtle shadows.
Slightly upturned outer corners suggesting a hint of curiosity.
eyes.expression_effect: Gives an impression of deep contemplation and subtle intrigue.

face.expression: A reserved yet intense expression, with slightly furrowed brows indicating focus.

skin.undertone: Hints of pink suggesting a delicate translucence.
skin.rendering_notes: Matte finish with soft, natural lighting emphasizing cheekbone structure.

hair.color: Jet black with a slight bluish sheen in direct light.
hair.style: Layered medium-length haircut with a fringe that slightly obscures the eyes.
hair.flow: Gentle wave creating volume, subtly parting towards the right side.
details: Strands naturally align, giving an intentionally unkempt yet organized look.

character.aura: His presence feels like a quiet force, drawing others in with an unspoken depth.

outfit.base: A well-fitted teal button-up shirt with rolled-up sleeves.
outfit.design: Minimalist design with subtle linear patterns and fine textures visible upon close inspection.
details: Brass buttons adding a vintage touch.
Cuffs accented with a thin, light grey trim.
outfit.fit: Tailored to emphasize a lean build, without restricting movement.

composition.framing: Mid shot from the waist up, angled slightly from the left to capture his profile.
composition.pose: Seated with one arm resting on an unseen table, fingers gently tapping.
composition.gesture: Left hand casually brushing through hair, conveying thoughtfulness.

background.color_palette: Muted earth tones with hints of olive and deep tan.
background.details: Soft focus elements suggesting a library environment.
background.rules: Avoid detailed objects; focus remains on the character.
